name: EventHandler - HideByCondition
description: Verify HideByCondition EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find skill with HideByCondition
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("HideByCondition"); }); skill != null ? skill.ToString() : null

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("HideByCondition"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers != null

steps.name: Find HideByCondition handler
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("HideByCondition"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); var handler = handlers.ToString().Contains("HideByCondition") ? handlers : null; handler != null

steps.name: Verify _type field
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("HideByCondition"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); var handlerStr = handlers.ToString(); handlerStr.Contains("HideByCondition") ? true : false

steps.name: Read Condition parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("HideByCondition"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers != null && handlers.ToString().Contains("Condition")
